'''rafazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oar|oar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oar|oar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rafazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræfæzhæth|ræfæzhæth]] || [[word:ræfæzhæj|ræfæzhæj]] || [[word:ræfæzhæsh|ræfæzhæsh]] || [[word:ræfæzhæ|ræfæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafafazhath|rafafazhath]] || [[word:rafafazhaj|rafafazhaj]] || [[word:rafafazhash|rafafazhash]] || [[word:rafafazha|rafafazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafazhath|rafazhath]] || [[word:rafazhaj|rafazhaj]] || [[word:rafazhash|rafazhash]] || [[word:rafazha|rafazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafafzhath|rafafzhath]] || [[word:rafafzhaj|rafafzhaj]] || [[word:rafafzhash|rafafzhash]] || [[word:rafafzhaf|rafafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rafazhatha|rafazhatha]] || [[word:rafazhaja|rafazhaja]] || [[word:rafazhasha|rafazhasha]] || [[word:rafazhaka|rafazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rafazhath|rafazhath]] || [[word:rafazhaj|rafazhaj]] || [[word:rafazhash|rafazhash]] || [[word:rafazha|rafazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rafazhathal|rafazhathal]] || [[word:rafazhajal|rafazhajal]] || [[word:rafazhashal|rafazhashal]] || [[word:rafazhakal|rafazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rafazhathatha|rafazhathatha]] || [[word:rafazhajaja|rafazhajaja]] || [[word:rafazhashasha|rafazhashasha]] || [[word:rafazhaka|rafazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rafazhathan|rafazhathan]] || [[word:rafazhajan|rafazhajan]] || [[word:rafazhashan|rafazhashan]] || [[word:rafazhakan|rafazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rafazhathaoro|rafazhathaoro]] || [[word:rafazhajaoro|rafazhajaoro]] || [[word:rafazhashaoro|rafazhashaoro]] || [[word:rafazhakaoro|rafazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
